c.d: The total number of active users on the app, indicating its popularity and potential audience reach.
c.s: Bigo Live, LiveMe, App store stats

c.d: Which operating systems (iOS, Android) and devices the app supports for live streaming.
Availability of features like virtual gifting, donations, subscriptions, sponsorships that enable creators to earn money.
Maximum resolution and video quality supported for live broadcasts.
How user-friendly the app interface is for both streamers and viewers, including simplicity of going live and interaction features.
Unique functionalities such as multi-guest streaming, real-time editing, branded overlays, audio-only streams, or multistreaming to multiple platforms.
Whether the app is free, freemium, or paid and details about in-app purchases or subscription tiers.
